features: Gift set featuring hand and body soap bar, hand cream, and a soap saver pouch
Soap is made from pure vegetable oils and shea butter
Hand cream is made from shea butter, aloe vera and vitamin E
description: Product description Give your hands the spa treatment they deserve with this luxury Christmas hand care gift set. Contains: 1x nordic pine scented soap bar 1x nordic pine scented hand cream 1x soap saver pouch The soap and hand cream have a fresh, festive fragrance with notes of pine and cypress, with sandalwood, cedarwood and cinnamon. The hand cream will keep your skin feeling soft and hydrated with the presence of Vitamin E in the cream. Ingredients: Soap: Sodium Palmate, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Aqua, Parfum, Glycerin, Palmitic Acid, Sodium Chloride, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, CI77891, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Benzyl Cinnamate, Cinnamal, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool. Hand Cream: Aqua, Isopropyl Palmitate, Cetyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Parfum, Dimethicone, Phenoxyethanol, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Tocopheryl Acetate, Allantoin, Maltodextrin, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Ethylhexylglycerin, Linalool, Eugenol, Cinnamal, Limonene, Benzyl Cinnamate. Ingredients Sodium Palmate, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Aqua, Parfum, Glycerin, Palmitic Acid, Sodium Chloride, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, CI77891, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Benzyl Cinnamate, Cinnamal, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool. Aqua, Isopropyl Palmitate, Cetyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Parfum, Dimethicone, Phenoxyethanol, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Tocopheryl Acetate, Allantoin, Maltodextrin, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Ethylhexylglycerin, Linalool, Eugenol, Cinnamal, Limonene, Benzyl Cinnamate. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach from children. For external use only. See more
